prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次约 19009→23187→19206→21581→26369，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025 年较 2024 年后移约 4788 名，近 3 年累计后移约 7163 名；2025 年基准约 26369 名；该校在陕西省物理类招生计划 2021–2024 年分别为 44、44、44、46 人，2025 年增至 47 人；2026 年计划大幅扩招至 78 人，较 2025 年增加约 66%，显著加剧竞争，位次预计明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 45 名，近年排名稳定在 42–47 名区间，属中上水平 211；抖音热度排名第 54（较热），综合热度约 56.4 万，关注度中等；未见明显投档断档记录；兽医学 A+、畜牧学 A+、作物学 A、水产 A、食品科学与工程 A，共 5 个 A-/A/A+ 学科，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机/电子信息/电气等工科专业社会热度持续偏热，但该校相关专业招生规模有限；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 206500 人，较 2025 年（172468 人）增长约 19.7%，竞争加剧；该校位于湖北武汉，在陕西招生占比约 0.9%–1.0%（2025 年），属跨省招生，无显著地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026 年计划大幅扩招约 66% 以及本省物理类考生增长约 19.7%，扩招效应大于考生增长效应，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基准 26369 名基础上明显后移；预测最低位次约 36505 名，区间 36005–37005 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 19009→23187→19206→21581→26369, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, it shifted back by about 4788 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative shift of about 7163 places over the past 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 26369. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Shaanxi was 44, 44, 44, and 46 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 47 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 78 students, an increase of about 66% compared to 2025, markedly intensifying competition and expected to cause a notable backward shift in ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 45th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in the 42–47 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. Douyin popularity ranking 54th (relatively popular), with comprehensive popularity of about 564,000, indicating moderate attention. No significant record of enrollment gaps. Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Husbandry A+, Crop Science A, Aquaculture A, Food Science and Engineering A, totaling 5 A-/A/A+ disciplines, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, providing stable appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering remains consistently high, but the university's enrollment scale for related majors is limited. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in this province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 2025 (172,468), intensifying competition. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, with an enrollment share in Shaanxi of about 0.9%–1.0% (2025), representing cross-provincial enrollment without significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the significant enrollment expansion of about 66% in 2026, and the increase of about 19.7% in Physics Category examinees in this province, the expansion effect outweighs the examinee growth effect. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift significantly backward from the 2025 baseline of 26369. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 36505, with a range of 36005–37005.

- Horticulture (National Excellent Agricultural and Forestry Talent Program)
- Food Science and Engineering (National Excellent Engineer Program in Food Science and Engineering, Food Quality and Safety, Food Nutrition and Health)

- Landscape Architecture

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 36005–37005, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Among Tier 1, Computer Science, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, and Veterinary Medicine are the most competitive, requiring rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the predicted range for assurance. Among Tier 2, Food Science and Engineering (A-level discipline), Smart Agriculture, and Animal Science have strong academic strength and moderate popularity, offering high cost-effectiveness. Among Tier 3, Economics and Big Data Management and Application can serve as stable choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<36005), focus on aiming for top-tier Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 3522 → 3322 → 6912 → 4053 → 4184, with significant fluctuations. In 2023, due to batch merging anomalies, the ranking shifted backward (6912), and in 2024–2025 it stabilized in the 4000–4200 range; the 2025 baseline is approximately 4184. The enrollment plan for this university in Shaanxi Province for History Category was 12 students each year from 2021 to 2025; in 2026, the plan slightly reduces to 11 students, a decrease of about 8.3% compared to 2025, intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 45th in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 42–47 range, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; Douyin popularity ranking is 54th (relatively popular), with a comprehensive popularity of about 564,000, indicating moderate attention; no significant record of admission cut-off anomalies; Veterinary Science A+, Animal Science A+, Crop Science A, Aquaculture A, Food Science and Engineering A, totaling 5 A-/A/A+ disciplines, with distinct agricultural and forestry characteristics, providing stable appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature, and Teacher Training/Education is polarized, with Law being relatively popular but highly competitive; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in this province is approximately 88,500, an increase of about 17.0% compared to 2025 (75,641), intensifying competition; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and its enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 0.9%–1.0% (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment without significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuation trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan by about 8.3%, and the increase in History Category examinees in this province by about 17.0%, both the enrollment reduction and the increase in examinees jointly push up competition. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (smaller ranking number = harder to enter) based on the 2025 baseline of 4184; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4005, with a range of 3505–4505.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3505–4505, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Among Tier 1, Economics and Law are the most competitive, requiring a ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the predicted range (<3505) to be secure; among Tier 2, although Business Administration and Advertising have relatively low social popularity, the university's disciplinary strength provides strong support; Tier 3 Sociology can serve as a stable safety choice. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors.
